name: The Western Front (WW1)
description:
110 years ago, in the year 1914, one of mankind's deadliest conflicts began. It would change war as we knew it. Men used to go to war on horses and marching, they came back riding tanks and trucks. The war would soar to new heights in aerial dogfights between the Knights of the Air. Some 29,150,000 million men were on the Western front, some 8,050,000 million men were injured, and some 3,536,000 would never return home.

The Italian Front is finished, you can find it here https://janitorai.com/characters/0425129a-7522-45e1-82ff-cf5128756269_character-italian-front-ww-1

This is a World War One RPG. It contains acts of violence (obviously) and sexual (but avoidable) content. Contains violence.

This is my first bot please give a review that is constructive criticism. Pls. If any equipment is wrong please leave a review stating which equipment it is and what is wrong with it.

Planned updates: None right now I'm going to work on a smaller bot for your enjoyment.

Version 0.1

Patch notes!

Added Spies and Seducers, people attempting to get information to your enemies, (who knew) added more NPC jobs that hopefully work such as combat medic, spy, seducer, tank crew, and pilot, added Saints, hero's of battles. Added more guns. Added Belgian firearms and uniforms. Added Chemical Warfare, including gases of the Chlorine, Phosgene, and Mustard Varieties.

Tag dump: War, World War, World War 1, The great war, Western Front, German Empire, British Empire, French Empire, Historical, RPG
